description: Frozen RQ2.2 decision must be pass.
RQ2.2 must include at least 10,000 MC mutation cases.
RQ2.2 must include at least four baseline modes.
Mutation modes must be present for MC robustness scope.
HSRAG target correctness must be at least 0.995.
HSRAG wrong collision rate must equal 0.0.
HSRAG no-evidence false allow rate must equal 0.0.
HSRAG ambiguous false allow rate must equal 0.0.
HSRAG mismatch escape rate must equal 0.0.
HSRAG audit-chain completion rate must equal 1.0.
HSRAG p95 latency must be below 10ms.
Best lexical baseline should expose nonzero wrong-collision risk in this benchmark comparison.
